operators.label: Site / Domain
operators.description: Restrict results to a specific domain, subdomain, or TLD
operators.notes: Use site:*.example.com for all subdomains

operators.label: In URL
operators.description: Keyword must appear in the URL
operators.notes: Case insensitive

operators.label: All In URL
operators.description: ALL specified keywords must appear in the URL
operators.notes: Space-separated; no other operators should follow

operators.label: In Anchor
operators.description: Keyword appears in anchor text of links pointing to the page
operators.notes: Useful for finding pages linked with specific text

operators.label: All In Anchor
operators.description: ALL keywords must appear in anchor text
operators.notes: Space-separated; no other operators should follow

operators.label: In Title
operators.description: Keyword must appear in the page title
operators.notes: Exact phrase match with quotes

operators.label: All In Title
operators.description: ALL keywords must appear in the page title
operators.notes: Space-separated; no other operators should follow

operators.label: In Text
operators.description: Keyword must appear in the body text of the page
operators.notes: Great for finding error messages or exposed content

operators.label: All In Text
operators.description: ALL keywords must appear in body text
operators.notes: Space-separated; no other operators should follow

operators.label: In Post Author
operators.description: Find blog posts written by a specific author
operators.notes: Works on indexed blog posts

operators.label: File Type
operators.description: Restrict results to a specific file extension
operators.notes: Alias: ext: — common: pdf, xls, doc, sql, env, log, bak, xml, json

operators.label: Extension (alias)
operators.description: Alias for filetype: — same behavior
operators.notes: Interchangeable with filetype:

operators.label: Cache
operators.description: View Google's cached version of a specific page
operators.notes: Returns the last cached snapshot

operators.label: Related
operators.description: Find websites similar to the specified URL
operators.notes: Useful for competitor research

operators.label: Info
operators.description: Show Google's summary information about a URL
operators.notes: May be deprecated in newer Google versions

operators.label: Before Date
operators.description: Limit results to pages indexed before this date
operators.notes: Format: YYYY-MM-DD

operators.label: After Date
operators.description: Limit results to pages indexed after this date
operators.notes: Format: YYYY-MM-DD

operators.label: Number Range
operators.description: Search within a numeric range
operators.notes: Format: low-high

operators.label: Number Range (shorthand)
operators.description: Shorthand range between two numbers
operators.notes: Used inline between two values

operators.label: OR
operators.description: Either term must be present (also: |)
operators.notes: Must be uppercase; also written as |

operators.label: AND
operators.description: Both terms must be present (default behavior with space)
operators.notes: Explicit AND; usually redundant with space

operators.label: Exclude (-)
operators.description: Exclude a term or operator result from results
operators.notes: No space between - and the term

operators.label: Exact Phrase
operators.description: Force exact phrase match
operators.notes: Use * inside quotes as wildcard placeholder

operators.label: Wildcard (*)
operators.description: Placeholder for any word in a phrase
operators.notes: Only works inside quoted strings

operators.label: Grouping
operators.description: Group terms to control operator precedence
operators.notes: Use with OR/AND for complex queries

operators.label: Synonym (~)
operators.description: Include synonyms of the term
operators.notes: May not work in all versions of Google
